steps.name: build-ios
steps.command: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm -C apps/desktop tauri ios build --ci

flows.name: Obscur Full Release (retired — do not use)

steps.name: preflight-checks
steps.command: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm release:integrity-check && pnpm version:check && pnpm docs:check

steps.name: build-desktop
steps.command: | && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm version:sync && | && | && | && | && | && | && node scripts/verify-desktop-bundle-filenames.mjs --dir ./bundle-artifacts && | && node scripts/verify-desktop-bundle-filenames.mjs --dir ./bundle-artifacts && | && node scripts/verify-desktop-bundle-filenames.mjs --dir ./bundle-artifacts

steps.name: build-android
steps.command: sdkmanager "ndk;25.2.9519653" && | && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm version:sync && | && | && | && | && | && node scripts/build-pwa-shell.mjs && | && | && |

steps.name: build-ios
steps.command: | && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm -C apps/desktop tauri ios build --ci && |

steps.name: relay-runtime-smoke
steps.command: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && | && node scripts/relay-runtime-smoke.mjs --relay ws://127.0.0.1:7000 --timeout-ms 7000 --skip-nip11 && node scripts/community-relay-hide-suppress-smoke.mjs && node scripts/community-relay-hide-registry-persist-smoke.mjs && node --test scripts/operator-relay-storage-compact.test.mjs && node scripts/community-bot-descriptor-contract-smoke.mjs && node --test scripts/community-outbound-bot.test.mjs

steps.name: release-test-pack
steps.command: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm release:test-pack -- --skip-preflight && echo "No reliability-scope changes detected; release:test-pack gate skipped for this run."

steps.name: build:static
steps.command: node scripts/toggle-api.js hide && next build && node scripts/toggle-api.js show

steps.name: test:legacy:stability
steps.command: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 vitest run app/features/messaging/lib/__tests__/checkpoint-basic-sending.test.ts app/features/messaging/lib/__tests__/checkpoint-9-core-messaging-complete.test.ts app/features/messaging/lib/__tests__/enhanced-dm-controller.test.ts app/features/messaging/lib/__tests__/integration-complete-flows.test.ts app/features/messaging/lib/__tests__/integration-multi-relay-failover.test.ts app/features/messaging/lib/__tests__/integration-offline-online.test.ts app/features/messaging/lib/__tests__/message-receiving.test.ts app/features/messaging/lib/__tests__/message-sync.test.ts app/features/messaging/lib/retry-manager.test.ts app/features/messaging/lib/message-ordering.test.ts app/features/messaging/utils/persistence.group-migration.test.ts app/features/invites/utils/__tests__/cross-platform-compatibility.test.ts app/features/invites/utils/__tests__/qr-generator.test.ts app/features/invites/utils/__tests__/system-e2e.test.ts app/features/crypto/__tests__/crypto-service.test.ts app/components/invites/__tests__/connection-list.test.tsx app/components/invites/__tests__/connection-import-export.test.tsx tests/e2e/messaging-flow.spec.ts tests/e2e/navigation.spec.ts tests/e2e/routes.spec.ts tests/e2e/search.spec.ts tests/e2e/smoke.spec.ts tests/e2e/theme.spec.ts

steps.name: build:android:debug
steps.command: pnpm version:sync && pnpm verify:android-prerequisites && pnpm -C apps/desktop build:android:debug

steps.name: build:android:debug:emulator
steps.command: pnpm version:sync && pnpm verify:android-prerequisites && pnpm -C apps/desktop build:android:debug:emulator

steps.name: build:android:release
steps.command: pnpm version:sync && pnpm verify:android-prerequisites && pnpm -C apps/desktop build:android:release

steps.name: perf:v2:baseline:compare
steps.command: node scripts/obscur-shell-perf-baseline.mjs compare docs/assets/perf/v2-dev-webpack.json docs/assets/perf/v2-static-prod.json --out docs/assets/perf/v2-comparison.json

steps.name: verify:auth-kernel-contracts
steps.command: node scripts/verify-auth-kernel-boundaries.mjs && pnpm -C apps/pwa exec vitest run ../../packages/dweb-auth/src/auth-kernel.contract.test.ts ../../packages/dweb-auth/src/policy/registration-policy-engine.test.ts ../../packages/dweb-auth/src/policy/auth-assistant-vault-codec.test.ts app/features/auth-kernel/auth-kernel.contract.test.ts app/features/auth-kernel/auth-kernel-authority-parity.contract.test.ts app/features/auth-kernel/auth-kernel-surface-routing.contract.test.ts app/features/auth-kernel/auth-kernel-k1.contract.test.ts app/features/auth-kernel/auth-kernel-k2.contract.test.ts app/features/auth-kernel/auth-kernel-k3.contract.test.ts app/features/auth-kernel/auth-kernel-k4.contract.test.ts app/features/auth-kernel/auth-kernel-kern-1.contract.test.ts app/features/auth-kernel/auth-kernel-kern-2.contract.test.ts app/features/auth-kernel/auth-kernel-kern-3.contract.test.ts app/features/auth-kernel/auth-kernel-kern-4.contract.test.ts app/features/auth-kernel/auth-kernel-kern-5.contract.test.ts app/features/auth-kernel/auth-kernel-manual-lock-state.test.ts app/features/auth-kernel/auth-kernel-profile-scope.test.ts app/features/auth-kernel/auth-kernel-registration-throttle.test.ts app/features/auth-kernel/auth-kernel-sign-out-cleanup.test.ts app/features/auth/services/auth-kernel-legacy-delegates.test.ts
